images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese high school student with a flawless gravure idol aesthetic, exhibiting cute yet seductive charm. She is wearing a trendy, form-fitting tennis skirt set featuring a crisp white pleated miniskirt and a matching snug polo top that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the fabric textured with soft cotton blends. She is peeking playfully from behind a tall stack of vintage vinyl records in a retro record store, her large expressive eyes squinting slightly in an adorable, contagious yawn. Beside her rests a basket of fresh fruit, adding a quirky, adventurous spirit to the scene. The lighting is vibrant and clear, illuminated by colorful neon signs that cast a soft, pastel glow without creating heavy shadows, maintaining a bright, airy atmosphere. The background is filled with aesthetic album covers, rendered with smooth bokeh to focus entirely on her. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, hyper-detailed skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
